parameters.query:
WITH selected_topic AS (
    SELECT {{ $('Select of Topic').item.json.id }}::integer AS topic_id
),

linked_products AS (
    SELECT p.*
    FROM products p
    JOIN product_topics pt ON pt.product_id = p.id
    JOIN selected_topic st ON st.topic_id = pt.topic_id
    ORDER BY RANDOM()
    LIMIT 3
),

fallback_products AS (
    SELECT p.*
    FROM products p
    ORDER BY RANDOM()
    LIMIT 3
),

selected_products AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM linked_products

    UNION ALL

    SELECT *
    FROM fallback_products
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM linked_products)

    LIMIT 3
),

random_food_products AS (
    SELECT
        jsonb_build_object(
            'name', name,
            'category', category,
            'nutrition', raw_data
        ) AS product
    FROM food_products
    WHERE is_allowed = TRUE
    ORDER BY RANDOM()
    LIMIT 10
)

SELECT jsonb_build_object(
    'herbalife_products',
    (
        SELECT jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'id', id,
                'name', name,
                'category', category,
                'description', description
            )
        )
        FROM selected_products
    ),
    'food_products',
    (
        SELECT jsonb_agg(product)
        FROM random_food_products
    )
) AS context;
